_comment: Synthetic captured run — intentionally drops the windows and inflates the slab so the harness demonstrates a missing-item + value regression. A real actual.json is the items the live pipeline produced for this job.

items.description: Ground-bearing concrete slab inc. DPM and insulation
Cavity wall, facing brick outer / blockwork inner
Plaster skim to walls and ceiling
Electrical first and second fix to extension
